allow: PowerShell($p = Start-Process npm -ArgumentList "run","dev" -NoNewWindow -PassThru -RedirectStandardOutput "dev.log" -RedirectStandardError "dev.err.log"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 6; $body = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5173/" -UseBasicParsing\).Content; $main = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5173/src/main.jsx" -UseBasicParsing\).StatusCode; Write-Host "ROOT_HAS_DIV:" \($body -match 'id="root"'\); Write-Host "MAIN_STATUS:" $main; Stop-Process -Id $p.Id -Force; Get-Content dev.err.log -Tail 5)
